details.test: Task 1: Book 2 GA tickets for highest-rated July weekend festival under 60
Task 2: Create 3-event low-cost schedule from multiple categories
Task 3: Choose best-value 3-day festival pass under 200 and add to cart
Task 4: Reserve 2 adjacent mid-priced central theatre seats under 80 each
Task 5: Register 1 adult and 1 child for family-friendly daytime workshop
Task 6: Book last-minute indoor event ticket for tonight after 7 PM under 40
Task 7: Reach subtotal >= 120 and apply FEST20 promo at checkout
Task 8: Book 1 student and 1 senior ticket for cheapest Friday film screening after 5 PM
Task 9: Add 3 highly-rated events from different categories next month to favorites
